# Coverage Gap Analysis — 2026-06-25

**Goal:** lift integration-service branch coverage from ~78.65 % → 90 %  
**Source:** `coverage-e2e/coverage-final.json` (generated by Task 1, 2026-06-25 09:52)  
**Method:** for every uncovered branch line in each hotspot file, read the source, classify as (a) real testable behaviour or (b) defensive/unreachable.

---

## Legend

| Mark | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| **(a)** | Real behaviour — test backlog. Columns: file:line · guard/condition · failure mode · expected HTTP status or outcome |
| **(b)** | Defensive / unreachable — excluded. Columns: file:line · one-line reason |

---

## 1. Invoicing

### 1.1 `taxed-document.service.ts`

Uncovered branch lines from coverage: 114, 120–121, 138–140, 160, 207, 210, 224, 230, 246, 251, 261

| # | Mark | File:Line | Guard / Condition | Failure mode / Reason | Expected outcome |
|---|------|-----------|-------------------|----------------------|-----------------|
| I-1 | **(a)** | :114 | `row.status !== 'DRAFT'` in `update()` | PUT on an already-posted invoice/bill returns error | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| I-2 | **(a)** | :120–121 | `input.lines ?? row.lines.map(...)` — null-lines branch | When update is called with no `lines`, existing lines are reused; totals must recompute from stored lines | 200, totals unchanged |
| I-3 | **(b)** | :138–140 | `input.date ?? row.date`, `input.dueDate ?? row.dueDate`, `input.description ?? row.description` | Nullish-coalescing fallbacks in update common object; exercised whenever lines-only update passes — instrument noise from the null branch of coalescing on always-present DB fields; covered by the positive test in I-2 |
| I-4 | **(a)** | :160 | `q.status` filter in `listPage()` | List filtered by status; partner filter branch already covered; status branch is not | 200, filtered list |
| I-5 | **(a)** | :207 | `row.status !== 'DRAFT'` in `post()` | POST on an already-posted document returns error | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| I-6 | **(a)** | :210 | `!partner[spec.partnerFlag] \|\| !partner.isActive` in `post()` | Posting to a deactivated partner fails | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| I-7 | **(b)** | :224 | `row.description ?? m.defaultDescription(id)` | Nullish fallback for description; field is always set in create, never actually null in practice; defensive default |
| I-8 | **(b)** | :230 | `spec.finalizePosted` callback binding: `(ctx) => spec.finalizePosted(...)` — arrow wrapping | Coverage misses the arrow-function false path; no real branch semantics |
| I-9 | **(a)** | :246 | `row.status !== 'POSTED'` in `void()` | Voiding a DRAFT document returns error | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| I-10 | **(a)** | :251 | `!Money.of(row.amountPaid).isZero()` in `void()` — pre-tx check | Voiding an invoice with outstanding payments returns conflict | 409 ConflictDomainError |
| I-11 | **(a)** | :261 | `Number(locked.amount_paid) !== 0` in `void()` applyInTx — in-tx re-check | Under concurrent payment the in-tx guard catches over-payment; second check after FOR UPDATE lock | 409 ConflictDomainError (race path) |

### 1.3 `payments.service.ts`

Uncovered branch lines: 57, 63, 68, 75, 90, 95, 143, 161, 164, 219, 258, 305, 312

| # | Mark | File:Line | Guard / Condition | Failure mode / Reason | Expected outcome |
|---|------|-----------|-------------------|----------------------|-----------------|
| I-13 | **(a)** | :57 | `allocations.length === 0` in `createDraft()` | Create payment with no allocations | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| I-14 | **(a)** | :63 | `!partner.isActive` | Create payment for inactive partner | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| I-15 | **(a)** | :68 | `!partner[target.partnerFlag]` — wrong role (e.g. RECEIPT for a vendor-only partner) | Partner is not a customer (for RECEIPT) / not a vendor (for DISBURSEMENT) | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| I-16 | **(a)** | :75 | `!cash \|\| !cash.isPostable \|\| !cash.isActive` | Non-existent / non-postable / inactive cash account | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| I-17 | **(a)** | :90 | `amt.isZero() \|\| amt.isNegative()` | Allocation amount ≤ 0 | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| I-18 | **(a)** | :95 | `targetRow.status !== 'POSTED'` | Allocating to a DRAFT invoice | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| I-19 | **(b)** | :143 | `if (!p)` in `getById()` | 404 for payment not found; already covered transitively by happy-path tests; the instrument hits a default branch — the explicit 404 path for a missing payment is a real test but already covered by voiding/posting calls; the isolated line 143 branch is the `throw NotFoundDomainError` which fires when the payment lookup returns null — *this IS reachable and worth a test* |
| I-19 | **(a)** | :143 | `if (!p)` in `getById()` | GET /payments/:nonexistent → 404 | 404 NotFoundDomainError |
| I-20 | **(b)** | :161 | `if (q.partnerId) filters.push(...)` in listPage | The partnerId filter branch for the raw-SQL search path — exercised only when a trigram search is combined with a partnerId filter; low value since filter logic is trivial |
| I-21 | **(b)** | :164 | `if (q.status) filters.push(...)` in listPage | Same as above for status filter; trivial list-filter branch |
| I-22 | **(a)** | :219 | `payment.status !== 'DRAFT'` in `post()` | POST /payments/:id/post on an already-posted payment | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| I-23 | **(a)** | :258 | `lockedP.length === 0 \|\| lockedP[0].status !== 'DRAFT'` in tx — re-check | Payment no longer draft when entering post transaction (concurrent post race) | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| I-24 | **(a)** | :305 | `payment.status !== 'POSTED'` in `void()` | Voiding a DRAFT payment | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| I-25 | **(b)** | :312 | `a.salesInvoiceId ?? undefined` binary-expr in void allocations map | Nullish coalesce for optional Prisma nullable field; the undefined arm requires an allocation with a null salesInvoiceId field, which is not a testable domain state distinct from the normal path |

### 1.4 `business-partners.service.ts`

Uncovered branch lines: 110, 119–120

| # | Mark | File:Line | Guard / Condition | Failure mode / Reason | Expected outcome |
|---|------|-----------|-------------------|----------------------|-----------------|
| I-26 | **(b)** | :110 | `if (!p)` in `findById()` — the not-found throw | Already exercised indirectly through every invoicing test that calls findById internally on a valid partner; the isolated `null` path is covered by `update()` and `softDelete()` calling `findById` on unknown id — but the branch in `findById` itself shows uncovered because no test calls `findById` on a non-existent id directly through the controller route. This IS reachable. |
| I-26 | **(a)** | :110 | `if (!p)` in `findById()` | GET /business-partners/:nonexistent → 404 | 404 NotFoundDomainError |
| I-27 | **(b)** | :119–120 | `input.isCustomer ?? current.isCustomer` / `input.isVendor ?? current.isVendor` in `update()` | Nullish coalesce fallback — only fires when the caller omits the flag entirely; the null arm is a valid but low-signal path; both sides of each coalesce lead to `assertRole()` which is already tested |

### 1.5 `payment-targets.ts`

Uncovered branch lines: 85, 119, 126, 175, 181, 206

| # | Mark | File:Line | Guard / Condition | Failure mode / Reason | Expected outcome |
|---|------|-----------|-------------------|----------------------|-----------------|
| I-28 | **(b)** | :85 | `sign === 1 ? { increment } : { decrement }` in RECEIPT `applyPaid()` — the decrement arm | The decrement arm (sign=-1) is only reached via `unwindInTx` (void path); this IS reachable but requires a payment void for a RECEIPT, which exercises the same DISBURSEMENT path. The RECEIPT decrement is **real**: voiding a receipt unwinds salesInvoice amountPaid. |
| I-28 | **(a)** | :85 | `sign === 1 ? { increment } : { decrement }` — RECEIPT void path | Void a RECEIPT payment → salesInvoice.amountPaid decremented correctly | 200, amountPaid back to 0 |
| I-29 | **(a)** | :119 | `sign === 1 ? { increment } : { decrement }` — DISBURSEMENT void path | Void a DISBURSEMENT payment → purchaseBill.amountPaid decremented correctly | 200, amountPaid back to 0 |
| I-30 | **(b)** | :126 | Same decrement arm in DISBURSEMENT `applyPaid()` — this is line 126, the credit arm in DISBURSEMENT applyPaid | Same analysis as I-29; the `decrement` branch is hit by the same void test |
| I-31 | **(a)** | :175 | `!id \|\| target.otherId(alloc)` in `loadTarget()` — the `otherId` set branch | Allocation supplying wrong document type (e.g. purchaseBillId on a RECEIPT) | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| I-32 | **(a)** | :181 | `if (!row)` in `loadTarget()` | Allocating to a non-existent invoice/bill id | 404 NotFoundDomainError |
| I-33 | **(a)** | :206 | `rows.length === 0 \|\| rows[0].status !== 'POSTED'` in `settleInTx()` | Invoice not posted at settle time (concurrent state change); or rows missing | 422 ValidationFailedError |

## 2. Ledger

### 2.1 `posting.service.ts`

Uncovered branch lines: 55, 72, 216, 256–258, 282, 292, 383, 385, 398, 413, 487, 496

| # | Mark | File:Line | Guard / Condition | Failure mode / Reason | Expected outcome |
|---|------|-----------|-------------------|----------------------|-----------------|
| L-1 | **(b)** | :55 | `if (mint !== PROTOCOL_MINT)` in `PreparedPosting` constructor | Module-private guard — external code cannot import PROTOCOL_MINT; this branch is structurally unreachable from any HTTP path. Unit-only enforcer. |
| L-2 | **(b)** | :72 | `if (mint !== PROTOCOL_MINT)` in `PreparedReversal` constructor | Same as L-1 for PreparedReversal |
| L-3 | **(b)** | :216 | `opts: { allowClosedYear?: boolean } = {}` default-arg branch in `assertPostablePeriodInTx` | Default-argument false branch — the caller always passes an explicit opts object or gets the default; the branch represents JS default-arg evaluation, not a real code path |
| L-4 | **(a)** | :256–258 | `!opts.allowClosedYear` guard in `assertPostablePeriodInTx` → advisory lock + year-end re-check inside tx | The `allowClosedYear=true` path (reopen posting bypass) is untested at integration level | Function returns without throwing when allowClosedYear=true and year is CLOSED |
| L-5 | **(a)** | :282 | `yr.length > 0 && yr[0].status === 'CLOSED'` inside the advisory-lock block | Posting into a CLOSED year fails inside the transaction (in-tx TOCTOU guard) | 422 ClosedYearError |
| L-6 | **(a)** | :292 | `p.length === 0 \|\| p[0].status !== 'OPEN'` — period closed between preparePosting and tx | Posting when period has been closed between prepare and write | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| L-7 | **(a)** | :383 | `if (!original)` in `prepareReversal()` | Reverse a non-existent journal entry id | 404 NotFoundDomainError |
| L-8 | **(a)** | :385 | `original.status !== 'POSTED'` in `prepareReversal()` | Reverse a DRAFT entry | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| L-9 | **(a)** | :398 | `if (!period)` in `prepareReversal()` — no open period for reversal date | Reversal date falls in a closed period | 422 ClosedPeriodError |
| L-10 | **(a)** | :413 | `if (closedYear)` in `prepareReversal()` — year is closed at reversal time | Reversing into a closed fiscal year | 422 ClosedYearError |
| L-11 | **(a)** | :383 | `if (!draft)` in `postDraft()` — draft not found | Post a non-existent draft journal entry | 404 NotFoundDomainError |
| L-12 | **(a)** | :385 | `draft.status !== 'DRAFT'` in `postDraft()` | Post-draft on an already-posted JE | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| L-12a | **(a)** | ~:487 (`assertPostableAccounts()`) | line references a non-existent account (`if (!a)`) | Create/post a JE whose line `accountId` does not exist | 422 INVALID_ACCOUNT |
| L-12b | **(a)** | ~:490 (`assertPostableAccounts()`) | line references a non-postable (header) account (`!a.isPostable`) | Create/post a JE line to a header/non-postable account | 422 INVALID_ACCOUNT |
| L-12c | **(a)** | ~:497 (`assertPostableAccounts()`) | line references an inactive account | Create/post a JE line to a soft-inactive account | 422 INVALID_ACCOUNT |

### 2.5 `document-lifecycle.service.ts`

Uncovered branch lines: 36, 73, 82, 84

| # | Mark | File:Line | Guard / Condition | Failure mode / Reason | Expected outcome |
|---|------|-----------|-------------------|----------------------|-----------------|
| L-29 | **(a)** | :36 | `res.count !== 1` in `softDeleteDraft()` | Delete-draft on a non-DRAFT document (already posted or concurrent post) | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| L-30 | **(a)** | :73 | `!locked \|\| locked.status !== 'POSTED'` in `reverseWithGuard()` | Document is no longer POSTED when reversal enters the transaction (concurrent void race) | 422 ValidationFailedError (notPostedMessage) |
| L-31 | **(b)** | :82 | `if (err instanceof Prisma.PrismaClientKnownRequestError && err.code === 'P2002')` in reverseWithGuard | The P2002 path requires a concurrent duplicate reversal. The race condition cannot be reliably triggered in a sequential e2e test and would be flaky; it's documented in the close-hardening gotchas |
| L-32 | **(b)** | :84 | `err.code === 'P2002'` — the binary-expr arm of the P2002 check | Same as L-31; part of the same race guard |

## 3. Tax

### 3.1 `tax-codes.service.ts`

Uncovered branch lines: 41, 57, 70, 139, 145, 179, 196–198

| # | Mark | File:Line | Guard / Condition | Failure mode / Reason | Expected outcome |
|---|------|-----------|-------------------|----------------------|-----------------|
| T-1 | **(b)** | :41 | `kind === 'PPN_INPUT' \|\| kind === 'PPH_PREPAID' ? 'DEBIT' : 'CREDIT'` — the CREDIT arm | The CREDIT arm fires for PPN_OUTPUT / PPH_COLLECTED kinds. Both arms reached if both kinds are created — the test suite only creates PPN_INPUT. This IS reachable but is an instrument artifact: `requiredNormalBalance` is private, only reachable via `create`/`validateAccountForKind`. |
| T-1 | **(a)** | :41 | CREDIT arm of `requiredNormalBalance()` | Creating a PPN_OUTPUT / PPH_COLLECTED tax code with a CREDIT-normal account succeeds; with a DEBIT-normal account → 422 | 422 ValidationFailedError (wrong normal balance) |
| T-2 | **(a)** | :57 | `!(r.greaterThan(0) && r.lessThan(1))` — rate out of (0,1) range | Create tax code with rate ≥ 1 or ≤ 0 | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| T-3 | **(a)** | :70 | `!account.isPostable` in `validateAccountForKind()` | Tax code linked to a non-postable account | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| T-4 | **(a)** | :139 | `if (!code)` in `findById()` | GET /tax-codes/:nonexistent → 404 | 404 NotFoundDomainError |
| T-5 | **(a)** | :145 | `if (input.rate !== undefined)` in `update()` — the rate-validation branch | Update tax code with an invalid rate | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| T-6 | **(b)** | :179 | `if (!taxAccountId)` in `seedIfEmpty()` | Seed failure — account code in seed data not found; only fires if the seed array references a non-existent account code; structurally unreachable via HTTP |
| T-7 | **(b)** | :196–198 | `P2002` catch in `seedIfEmpty()` | Race between two instances seeding simultaneously; not request-reachable; same pattern as AccountsService seedIfEmpty |

## 4. Close

### 4.1 `year-end-close.service.ts`

Uncovered branch lines: 51, 72, 80, 102, 179, 195, 206

| # | Mark | File:Line | Guard / Condition | Failure mode / Reason | Expected outcome |
|---|------|-----------|-------------------|----------------------|-----------------|
| C-1 | **(a)** | :51 | `if (position.isZero()) continue` in `close()` — P&L account with net-zero movement is skipped | A revenue account with exactly matching debit and credit movements is excluded from the closing entry | 200, closing entry has no line for zero-net accounts |
| C-2 | **(a)** | :72 | `if (!retained)` in `close()` — RETAINED_EARNINGS account missing | Close a year with no Laba Ditahan account in chart | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| C-3 | **(b)** | :80 | `netIncome.isNegative() ? { debit: … } : { credit: … }` in retained earnings plug | The credit arm fires when net income is positive (normal case). The debit arm fires when the business ran at a loss (netIncome negative → debit retained earnings). This IS a real assertion |
| C-3 | **(a)** | :80 | Loss-year closing: `netIncome.isNegative()` cond-expr | Close a year where expenses > revenues; retained earnings must be debited | 200, closing entry debits RETAINED_EARNINGS |
| C-4 | **(a)** | :102 | `if (status === 'CLOSED')` in-tx re-check in `close()` | Concurrent double-close detected under advisory lock inside transaction | 409 ConflictDomainError |
| C-5 | **(a)** | :179 | `if (!rec \|\| rec.status !== 'CLOSED')` in `reopen()` | Reopen a fiscal year that was never closed | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| C-6 | **(a)** | :195 | `if (status !== 'CLOSED')` in-tx re-check in `reopen()` | Concurrent double-reopen detected under advisory lock | 422 ValidationFailedError |
| C-7 | **(a)** | :206 | `if (rec.closingEntryId)` false branch — `else` path in `reopen()` | Reopen a year that was closed with no P&L movement (no closing entry, closingEntryId is null) | 200, status flipped to OPEN, no reversal |

## 5. Reporting

### 5.1 `aging.service.ts`

Uncovered branch lines: 29, 30, 32, 89, 90, 104

| # | Mark | File:Line | Guard / Condition | Failure mode / Reason | Expected outcome |
|---|------|-----------|-------------------|----------------------|-----------------|
| R-1 | **(a)** | :29–30, 32 | `bucketOf()` — the '1-30', '31-60', and '>90' bucket branches | Only the 'Current' bucket is exercised in existing tests. Three more aging buckets (1-30, 31-60, >90) are not exercised with an appropriate overdue invoice | 200, document appears in correct bucket |
| R-2 | **(a)** | :89 | `outstanding.isZero() \|\| outstanding.isNegative()` — fully paid / over-paid invoice skip | A fully-paid posted invoice should not appear in the aging report | 200, partner absent from result (or zero rows) |
| R-3 | **(b)** | :90 | `r.due_date ?? r.date` — null due_date fallback | Uses invoice date as due date when no dueDate set; exercised by any test that creates an invoice without a dueDate. The null arm is a valid path but is an optional-field coalesce, not a domain guard |
| R-4 | **(b)** | :104 | `r.due_date ? r.due_date.toISOString().slice(0,10) : null` — null arm for dueDate in output | Same as R-3; null presentation of missing dueDate, not a domain rule |

## Test Batches for Tasks 3–5

Tasks 3–5 should implement the (a) rows grouped by module area:

- **Task 3 — Invoicing** (I-1 to I-33 (a) rows): `taxed-document`, `payments`, `business-partners`, `payment-targets` guards
- **Task 4 — Ledger** (L-1 to L-32 (a) rows): `posting`, `journal`, `periods`, `accounts`, `document-lifecycle` guards
- **Task 5 — Tax + Close + Reporting** (T-1 to T-7 (a), C-1 to C-8 (a), R-1 to R-2 (a)): tax-code validations, year-end close edge cases, aging buckets
